title: Ad hoc layout
summary: Ad hoc layout rules outside named grid behavior break the constitutional geometry.
repair: Return the screen to PageGrid, named regions, and finite primitive combinations.

title: Spacing repair
summary: Arbitrary spacing values repair local rhythm instead of using token law.
repair: Delete local spacing wrappers and replace them with Stack, Row, or token-bound props.

title: Decorative wrapper
summary: Decorative wrappers with no structural responsibility obscure the real surface law.
repair: Delete the wrapper unless it owns a named primitive or semantic role.

title: Decorative naming
summary: Components named after style, palette, or mood dissolve the role-based system.
repair: Rename the surface by structure, intent, or product role.

title: Variant sprawl
summary: Open-ended variants and boolean prop sprawl weaken finite APIs.
repair: Replace freeform variants with finite enums or a narrower semantic split.

title: Prompt invented layout
summary: Prompt-to-prompt layout invention without recipe or primitive fit abandons the doctrine.
repair: Choose a recipe or allowed primitive composition before writing new UI code.

title: Default library identity
summary: Component-library defaults treated as product identity flatten the system into generic SaaS.
repair: Recompose from New Alphabet primitives, components, and recipes instead of imported taste.

title: Per-screen exception
summary: Per-screen exceptions weaken family resemblance and hide drift.
repair: Prefer the shared grammar or add a documented constitutional expansion.

title: Ornament over hierarchy
summary: Color or ornament doing work that hierarchy, type, or structure should do is not allowed.
repair: Move hierarchy back into structure, typography, and semantic status text.

title: AI taste simulation
summary: AI-generated output that simulates taste instead of enforcing law is outside the project.
repair: Require schema-backed recipes, state coverage, and validation before accepting generated output.

title: Implementation drift
summary: Recipes, primitives, and components outside the published inventory bypass the constitutional system.
repair: Return to the published inventory or expand the doctrine explicitly before generating more structure.

title: Broad flavor bucket
summary: A runtime flavor that hides multiple unrelated host stacks weakens explicit host binding and turns policy into taste.
repair: Split the bucket into concrete host bindings or move the guidance into workbench policy.

title: Workbench chrome drift
summary: Dense product work that grows hero chrome, card mosaics, decorative gradients, or wrapper pyramids abandons the workbench law.
repair: Return the surface to rows, panes, dividers, compact controls, and explicit region hierarchy.
